guideline: 2022 Taiwan Guidelines for the Management of Hypertension
source: Taiwan Society of Cardiology / Taiwan Hypertension Society

recommendations.text: A universal BP target of < 130/80 mmHg, based on HBPM obtained according to the 722 protocol, is recommended for all hypertensive patients.
recommendations.text_zh: 建議所有高血壓患者之通用血壓目標為 < 130/80 mmHg（依 722 protocol 居家血壓測量）。

recommendations.text: The SBP target can be < 120 mmHg for patients with ASCVD or at high CV risk, if tolerable.
recommendations.text_zh: ASCVD 或高心血管風險患者，如可耐受，SBP 目標可 < 120 mmHg。

recommendations.text: A BP level of ≥ 140/90 mmHg should be the threshold for low-risk (no established ASCVD or HMOD, and < 3 ASCVD risk factors) hypertensive patients to initiate pharmacological treatment.
recommendations.text_zh: 低風險患者（無 ASCVD/HMOD，且風險因子 < 3）之藥物治療閾值為 ≥ 140/90 mmHg。

recommendations.text: For other hypertensive patients, a BP level of ≥ 130/80 mmHg is recommended as the threshold to initiate pharmacological treatment.
recommendations.text_zh: 其他高血壓患者之藥物治療閾值為 ≥ 130/80 mmHg。

recommendations.text: For patients with diabetes mellitus, a BP target of < 130/80 mmHg, based on HBPM or standardized office BP, is recommended.
recommendations.text_zh: 糖尿病患者血壓目標建議 < 130/80 mmHg。

recommendations.text: For patients with coronary heart disease, a BP target of < 130/80 mmHg is recommended.
recommendations.text_zh: 冠心病患者血壓目標建議 < 130/80 mmHg。

recommendations.text: A BP target of < 130/80 mmHg should be considered for most patients in the chronic stage of stroke.
recommendations.text_zh: 慢性期中風患者血壓目標建議 < 130/80 mmHg。

recommendations.text: The initial BP target is < 140/90 mmHg in the convalescence stage regardless of extracranial/intracranial large vessel disease or cerebral small vessel disease.
recommendations.text_zh: 中風恢復期初始血壓目標為 < 140/90 mmHg。

recommendations.text: For patients with non-dialysis CKD, an SBP target of < 130 mmHg, based on HBPM or standardized office BP, is recommended.
recommendations.text_zh: 非透析 CKD 患者 SBP 目標建議 < 130 mmHg。

recommendations.text: If patients with CKD tolerate well, an SBP target of < 120 mmHg could be considered.
recommendations.text_zh: CKD 患者如可耐受，SBP 目標可考慮 < 120 mmHg。

recommendations.text: For dialysis CKD patients, interdialytic home BP target of < 130/80 mmHg may be considered.
recommendations.text_zh: 透析患者透析間居家血壓目標可考慮 < 130/80 mmHg。

recommendations.text: Renin-angiotensin system inhibitor is the antihypertensive drug of choice for CKD patients with or without diabetes.
recommendations.text_zh: CKD 患者（不論有無糖尿病）首選 RAS 抑制劑（ACEi/ARB）。

recommendations.text: For hypertensive patients with chronic heart failure, the SBP threshold for pharmacological therapy is ≥ 130 mmHg.
recommendations.text_zh: 心衰竭患者藥物治療閾值為 SBP ≥ 130 mmHg。

recommendations.text: For hypertensive patients with chronic heart failure, the SBP target for pharmacological therapy is < 130 mmHg.
recommendations.text_zh: 心衰竭患者 SBP 目標為 < 130 mmHg。

recommendations.text: For patients aged ≥ 65 years, the SBP threshold for pharmacological therapy is ≥ 130 mmHg.
recommendations.text_zh: ≥ 65 歲患者藥物治療閾值為 SBP ≥ 130 mmHg。

recommendations.text: For patients aged ≥ 65 years, the SBP target for pharmacological therapy is < 130 mmHg.
recommendations.text_zh: ≥ 65 歲患者 SBP 目標為 < 130 mmHg。

recommendations.text: Sodium intake should be restricted within 2-4 g/day (5-10 g of salt per day) for better BP control and lower CV risk.
recommendations.text_zh: 鈉攝取應限制在 2-4 g/天（鹽 5-10 g/天）以改善血壓控制及降低心血管風險。

recommendations.text: Alcohol consumption should be limited to < 100 g/week (14 g/day) in men and < 50 g/week (7 g/day) in women to improve BP control and lower the risk of all-cause mortality.
recommendations.text_zh: 男性酒精攝取應限制 < 100 g/週，女性 < 50 g/週，以改善血壓控制及降低死亡風險。

recommendations.text: An ideal body mass index is 20-24.9 kg/m² to improve BP control and lower the risk of all-cause mortality.
recommendations.text_zh: 理想 BMI 為 20-24.9 kg/m²，以改善血壓控制及降低死亡風險。

recommendations.text: Cessation of cigarette smoking, irrespective of conventional or electronic cigarettes, should be an integral part of lifestyle modification to reduce overall CV risk.
recommendations.text_zh: 戒菸（含傳統及電子菸）應為生活型態調整之重要一環，以降低整體心血管風險。

recommendations.text: Regular aerobic exercise (at least 30 min of moderate-intensity exercise on 5-7 days/week), with or without resistance exercise, is recommended to improve BP control and reduce CV mortality.
recommendations.text_zh: 建議規律有氧運動（每週 5-7 天，每次至少 30 分鐘中等強度），以改善血壓控制及降低心血管死亡率。

recommendations.text: High-intensity exercise is not recommended for patients with uncontrolled hypertension (SBP > 160 mmHg).
recommendations.text_zh: 未控制高血壓（SBP > 160 mmHg）患者不建議高強度運動。

recommendations.text: All 5 major antihypertensive drugs (ACE inhibitors, ARBs, β-blockers, CCBs, and thiazide diuretics) are first-line antihypertensive drugs.
recommendations.text_zh: 五大類降壓藥物（ACEi、ARB、β-blocker、CCB、Thiazide）均為第一線降壓藥物。

special_notes.heart_failure: 心衰竭患者應優先選擇 DHP 類 CCB (如 Amlodipine)，避免 non-DHP CCB (Diltiazem/Verapamil)，因 non-DHP CCB 具負性肌力作用，可能惡化 HFrEF/HFmrEF (ESC HF5.1)

recommendations.text: Spironolactone is recommended as one of the second-line antihypertensive drugs.
recommendations.text_zh: Spironolactone 為第二線降壓藥物。

recommendations.text: Any combination between direct renin inhibitor, ACE inhibitor and ARB is contraindicated.
recommendations.text_zh: 禁止 DRI、ACEi、ARB 任意組合併用。

recommendations.text: Shifting to drugs with a longer-acting antihypertensive effect is recommended for uncontrolled evening hypertension.
recommendations.text_zh: 傍晚高血壓未控制者，建議換用長效降壓藥物。

recommendations.text: Bedtime dosing is recommended for uncontrolled morning hypertension.
recommendations.text_zh: 晨間高血壓未控制者，建議睡前給藥。

recommendations.text: Adding another antihypertensive drug is recommended for uncontrolled morning and evening hypertension.
recommendations.text_zh: 晨間及傍晚血壓皆未控制者，建議加藥。
